title: Keep Shared Contracts Canonical
guidance: Shared request response and schema types should live in one canonical contract layer
do: Update shared contracts and downstream consumers together
dont: Do not create shadow DTOs that drift from the source contract

title: Align Runtime and Compile-Time Types
guidance: Zod runtime validation and TypeScript types should describe the same shapes and invariants
do: Keep schema definitions and inferred types in sync
dont: Do not let runtime parsers and declared types diverge

title: Document Breaking Contract Changes
guidance: When a contract change is breaking callers need migration notes and a clear blast radius
do: Call out affected consumers and migration needs
dont: Do not silently change shared DTO semantics
